heading: Governing body
label: 100105 Governing body
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)100105(a)36:1706., , §§ 6, 7, .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–8295 Stat. 1092100105(b)36:1707.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:1706 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:1707 are omitted as unnecessary.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)100105(a)36:1706., , §§ 6, 7, .Nov. 20, 1981Pub. L. 97–8295 Stat. 1092100105(b)36:1707.The words “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States in which it is incorporated” in 36:1706 and “and in conformity with the laws of the State or States wherein it is incorporated” in 36:1707 are omitted as unnecessary.

children.heading: .—Board of Directors
children.label: a .—Board of Directors
children.text: The board of directors and the responsibilities of the board are as provided in the articles of incorporation.

children.heading: .—Officers
children.label: b .—Officers
children.text: The officers and the election of officers are as provided in the articles of incorporation.
